agent_decision.intent: Primary and secondary actions with Vessel pill geometry and semantic state roles.
when_to_use: Use for explicit user actions, form submission, menus, and compact icon controls.
when_not_to_use: Do not use as a layout container.
Do not override radius or palette with raw classes.
common_misuses: Adding raw palette utilities to force emphasis.
Using icon-only buttons without an accessible label.
Inventing one-off button heights instead of the size prop.
